methodsAttempted.notes: Found university-wide GenAI guidance, IT getting started page, instructor options, and library academic integrity guide.
Found library academic integrity guide and Galter guide for students.
Found IT news pages and AI tools hub. Hub page rejected as generic.
Found Searle Center teaching guides and IT teaching-with-AI pages.
Found IT data and privacy 101 page and getting started guidance.
Only event pages returned from ai.northwestern.edu; no policy pages found.

summary: Discovery used 6 site_search queries on northwestern.edu and ai.northwestern.edu. Identified 6 verified policy-relevant sources covering university-wide GenAI guidance, approved AI tools (Copilot), instructor course policy options, academic integrity, data classification/privacy, and student learning resources. Rejected 12 sources including generic homepages, campus-specific policies (Qatar, Feinberg, Law), news pages, research showcases, and library hub pages.
